name: operator-ssh-dual-host-recovery
description: Operator-grade dual-host SSH workflow that deliberately disconnects one host workspace and verifies selective recovery.

steps.label: establish_workspaces
steps.prompt: Please connect to haswell and cinnamon, confirm which pane belongs to which host, and collect a short hostname plus uptime summary from each.

steps.label: disconnect_one_host
steps.prompt: Disconnect only the cinnamon workspace cleanly, keep haswell alive, and prove you still know which pane is which afterward.

steps.label: recover_only_affected_host
steps.prompt: Recover cinnamon only, without recreating or disturbing the haswell workspace, then collect a short free-memory summary from both hosts.

steps.label: summarize_recovery
steps.prompt: Summarize the final host-to-pane mapping and exactly which workspace had to be recreated or reused during recovery.
